articles.title: Why US struck Iran amid shaky ceasefire: 10 things to know about the 'self-defence' strikes
articles.description: US forces struck Iranian missile sites and boats near the Strait of Hormuz. This happened during peace talks aimed at ending a three-month conflict. Iran accused the US of a war crime. Reports mentioned explosions and fatalities on Larak Island. Discussions continue on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and Iran's uranium stockpile.

articles.title: What can happen to Iran’s uranium? Trump lays out options for turning it into 'nuclear dust'
articles.description: US forces conducted 'self-defense' strikes on Iranian missile sites and boats near the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions despite ongoing diplomatic talks. President Trump warned Iran on enriched uranium, demanding its surrender or destruction. Iran condemned the strikes as a 'war crime,' accusing the US of targeting civilians. Peace negotiations continue, reportedly discussing the Strait's reopening and a ceasefire extension.

articles.title: From Z-plus security to stripped surveillance: Why cops landed at Abhishek Banerjee’s residence
articles.description: Kolkata police visited Abhishek Banerjee's Shantiniketan residence. Plainclothes officers removed a monitor and hard disks. This follows a reduction in Banerjee's security cover. Trinamool claims it was a routine removal of security equipment. Police stated it was a standard official exercise. The incident has sparked speculation.

articles.title: IPL Qualifier 1: Away from Kohli vs Gill spotlight, Bhuvi vs Siraj may decide the contest
articles.description: Amid the Virat Kohli–Shubman Gill spotlight and Dharamsala’s batting-friendly conditions, IPL Qualifier 1 could be decided not by the big hitters but by the bowlers. With both Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru boasting disciplined and in-form attacks featuring Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Mohammed Siraj, Kagiso Rabada and Rashid Khan, the battle for early breakthroughs and composure in key overs may determine who books a direct ticket to the final.
articles.full_text: Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. Read More

articles.title: Why is PewDiePie ending his YouTube vlogs? The touching reason behind the end of his family series
articles.description: PewDiePie has announced that his monthly YouTube vlogs will end in September 2026 after nearly four years. The decision is largely driven by his desire to let his son, Björn, grow up away from the internet and choose for himself whether he wants to appear online in the future. While the vlogs are ending, Felix and Marzia said they may still occasionally share family moments through social media.

articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold prices drop on fresh US strikes in Iran
articles.full_text: Gold prices rose in futures trade on Monday, tracking gains in global markets amid growing optimism surrounding a possible peace agreement between the United States and Iran. Retail gold rates across major Indian cities also moved higher, with 22K, 24K and 18K prices recording gains compared to the previous day. On the Multi Commodity Exchange (MCX), gold contracts for June delivery climbed by Rs 426, or 0.27 per cent, to Rs 1,59,105 per 10 grams in a business turnover of 5,312 lots. As per PTI, analysts attributed the rise to a weaker US dollar and positive sentiment linked to the ongoing US-Iran negotiations. Trump has been raising market hopes for some sort of deal with Iran, which could lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. That prospect has weighed on oil prices and, by extension, given gold a welcome lift from an inflation perspective

articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: TS DEECET 2026 answer key, response sheet released at deecet.cdse.telangana.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.description: The Telangana Department of School Education has released the TS DEECET 2026 preliminary answer key, candidate response sheets, and question papers on May 25. Candidates can download these from the official website and raise objections until May 26, 5 PM. The results are expected on May 30, with counselling registration beginning June 1.

articles.title: DHSE Kerala plus two result 2026: How to check Class 12 marksheets on DigiLocker
articles.description: The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education, Kerala, will release the Plus Two Class 12 results today, May 26. Students can check their marksheets on DigiLocker, keralaresults.nic.in, and dhsekerala.gov.in. Over 4.5 lakh students appeared for the exams. The results will be available from 3 pm. DigiLocker offers a digital copy for immediate use.

articles.title: Kerala HSE 12th result 2026 today: Check list of official websites to download plus two result
articles.description: The Directorate of Higher Secondary Education (DHSE), Kerala, will release the Plus Two result for 2026 today, May 26, with scores accessible from 3 pm. Approximately 4,25,437 students appeared for the Class 12 examinations, which concluded on March 28. Students can download their provisional scorecards online via official websites and other platforms.

articles.title: NIMCET 2026 hall ticket date and time: Exam scheduled on June 6 at 2 PM; here’s how to download at nimcet.admissions.nic.in
articles.description: NIMCET 2026 admit card will be available for download from May 27 to June 6, 2026, on the official portal using user ID and password. The entrance exam for MCA admission in NITs and IIITs will be held on June 6 from 2 PM to 4 PM. Candidates must carry a printed hall ticket and valid ID. The schedule also includes answer key challenge, result declaration, counselling rounds and final seat allotment process.

articles.title: Is Virat's 'infinity' tattoo a tribute to Anushka and kids?
articles.description: Cricketer Virat Kohli's new waist tattoo, featuring an infinity symbol, has sparked speculation among fans. Many believe the ink is a heartfelt tribute to his wife Anushka Sharma and their children, Vamika and Akaay. This latest body art follows recent additions to his arms, with Kohli previously expressing his fondness for tattoos.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Sean Penn
articles.description: Sean Penn, a celebrated actor, openly questions the allure of stardom, calling celebrity culture an "obscene disease." Despite achieving immense success, he expresses a desire to "turn one's back on stardom," viewing it as a form of common sense. Penn's candid reflections reveal his discomfort with Hollywood's machinery and his pursuit of authenticity over fame.

articles.title: Sam Levinson addresses shocking death in ‘Euphoria 3’
articles.description: In a bold move, Sam Levinson, the mastermind behind Euphoria, reflects on the deeply unsettling moment of Nate Jacobs' live burial in the third season. Levinson's intention was to evoke intense anxiety, challenging viewers to ponder the morality of Nate's end. To amplify the horror of this gripping desert sequence, he incorporated both real and harmless snakes.

articles.title: Meghan Markle shares sweet nicknames for Prince Archie, Princess Lilibet
articles.description: Meghan Markle shared her family's favorite fruit spreads, revealing Prince Harry enjoys raspberry, while four-year-old Princess Lilibet, nicknamed 'Lil', prefers strawberry. Seven-year-old Prince Archie, or 'Arch', likes both. The Duchess herself favors marmalade. This offers a sweet peek into their daily life and connections to her lifestyle brand, which also features candles inspired by the children's birthdays.
